name: Checkerboards
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix flour, baking powder, and salt; set aside.
2. Cream butter until smooth.
3. Gradually add sugar, beating until light and fluffy.
4. Add egg and vanilla; beat well.
5. Gradually add flour mixture, mixing after each addition.
6. Divide dough in half. Blend chocolate into one half.
7. Use prepared doughs to make checkerboards.
Checkerboards:
1. Set out a small amount of milk.
2. Roll out chocolate and vanilla doughs separately onto lightly floured boards into 9 x 4 1/2 inch rectangles.
3. Brush chocolate dough lightly with milk and top with vanilla dough.
4. Using a sharp knife, cut lengthwise into 3 strips, 1 1/2 inches wide.
5. Stack strips, alternating colors and brushing each layer with milk.
6. Cut lengthwise again into 3 strips, 1/2 inch wide.
7. Invert the middle section so that colors are alternated; brush side with milk.
8. Press strips together lightly to form a rectangle.
9. Wrap in waxed paper and chill overnight.
10. Cut into 1/8 inch slices using a very sharp knife.
11. Place on baking sheets.
12. Bake at 375 degrees for about 8 minutes, or until the white portions start to brown.
13. Cool on racks.
